title: Hermes Agent Self-Evolution Cover v3
brief: A blog cover illustration for a technical article about the Hermes Agent self-evolution mechanism. The central visual anchor is the Hermes Agent logo: a stylized black-and-white portrait of a young woman with straight dark hair and bangs (use the reference image as the logo). Place this logo prominently, with looping arrows, floating SKILL.md document pages, glowing code fragments, and subtle gear mechanisms forming a self-improving loop around it. Use a dark navy or charcoal background with gold and cyan accent lighting. Modern, minimal, tech-forward. Leave clean negative space at the top for the article title.
prompt:
Create an illustration titled 'Hermes Agent Self-Evolution Cover v3'. Style: contemporary editorial illustration, layered composition, subtle texture, restrained color palette, atmospheric but concrete, article-friendly visual metaphor, no text labels, no diagrams, no arrows. This is for an article or essay — not a technical document. Do NOT add any diagrams, arrows, labels, callouts, or text. Focus on a concrete visual idea with atmosphere, restraint, and editorial clarity. This is a WeChat Official Account headline cover image (公众号头条封面). Compose for a 2.35:1 ultra-wide crop (1080x460). Keep key subjects centered or in the bottom third — top area will be cropped. Design for readability as a small thumbnail in WeChat's subscription feed. Title text will be overlaid by the editor, so leave ample negative space. Language/region: zh. Target aspect ratio: blog-banner. Mode: reference+text. Use the provided reference image or images only for style guidance such as palette, line quality, spacing, icon treatment, and annotation tone. Do not copy their literal subject matter.
